item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: {"status":"continue","judgment":"partially-confirmed","observation":"The Still Guest remains approaching on the right with bearingRadians=0.571 and beamContact=false. The prior right turn improved alignment from 1.743 to 0.571 without movement; the encounter is not yet repelled.","trend":"Successive right turns are steadily reducing the positive bearing toward beam alignment, but contact has not yet occurred and visual luminance remains unreadable.","reasoningSummary":"State evidence supports another bounded right turn because the encounter remains active, right-sided, and not in beam contact.
